title: The Barber of Seville
writer: Beaumarchais, Bobby E. Lüthge, Benito Perojo
actors: Miguel Ligero, Raquel Rodrigo, Roberto Rey
plot: Since he falls for beautiful Rosina, the Almaviva count is questioning his Donjuanesque life. He resolves to travel to Seville to seek advice from famed Figaro, who is much more than a barber.
